body: Builder-Scout has successfully scaffolded the AICoreStatusPanel in ai_chi_web. It acts as the frontend representation of the ai_core_status_summary offline handler, visualizing the Triad boundary invariant (Urbi/Orbi/MEBUS), the boundary constraints (DreamLens/MSDT), and the test baseline (292 OK). The UI is active and the build is clean. Antigravity task complete.
